name: tcl-ls-vscode
description: VS Code extension for the tcl-ls language server.

tcl-ls.server.command.markdownDescription: Command used to start the language server. Prefer the executable name here and pass the rest through `tcl-ls.server.args`. If `tcl-ls.server.args` is empty, a command line such as `uv run tcl-ls` is also accepted. Quote any path that contains spaces.

tcl-ls.server.repoRoot.markdownDescription: Repository root for local `tcl-ls` development. When `tcl-ls.server.command` is empty and this is set, the extension starts `/path/to/repo/.venv/bin/tcl-ls` from that checkout.

tcl-ls.server.cwd.markdownDescription: Working directory used when starting the language server. Relative paths are resolved against the first workspace folder.

tcl-ls.server.restartOnProjectFileChange.markdownDescription: Restart the language server when `tcllsrc.tcl`, `pkgIndex.tcl`, or `*.meta.tcl` files are created, changed, or deleted.

scripts.check: node --check src/command-line.js && node --check src/extension.js && npm run test
